blocks.description: Header comments, OPTIONS for macro debugging and page layout, and LIBNAME statements for raw survey data (read-only), staging workspace, and target output library.

DATA step to recode negatively worded Likert items (Q3, Q7, Q12), compute composite engagement/satisfaction/leadership scores via MEAN(), categorize respondents into engagement tiers, and calculate response completeness using an ARRAY loop.
PROC FREQ to cross-tabulate engagement tier by department and tenure group with CHISQ option for statistical significance testing.
PROC MEANS to compute department-level aggregate statistics (N, mean, std, min, max, CLM) for all composite scores, with OUTPUT statement creating staging.dept_means summary dataset.
Three PROC CORR blocks for scale reliability analysis: inter-item correlations for engagement (Q1-Q4), satisfaction (Q5-Q8), and leadership (Q9-Q12) composite scales.

PROC SQL to create demographic summary table aggregating composite scores and highly-engaged percentages by department, tenure group, and gender, with HAVING clause filtering groups with at least 5 respondents.

DATA step to flag outlier respondents: detects straight-line responding via ARRAY min/max comparison, flags low completion rates and extreme overall scores, and builds concatenated quality notes for each flagged respondent.
